messages.content: Our paper ScaleCUA is selected as oral to ICLR 2026! 上面这句话有没有语病

有一点不够地道，但不算“语病”，更像英文表达习惯问题：

- **“selected as oral to ICLR 2026”** 里介词 **to** 不自然。通常说 **selected for an oral presentation at ICLR 2026** 或 **accepted as an oral**。
- 另外更常见的说法是 **“accepted as an oral (presentation)”**（ICLR 语境里用 accepted 更贴近会议用语）。

可选改写（从最自然到更口语）：

1. **Our paper ScaleCUA has been accepted as an oral presentation at ICLR 2026!**  
2. **Our paper ScaleCUA was accepted as an oral at ICLR 2026!**  
3. **ScaleCUA is accepted as an oral at ICLR 2026!**（更口语，但现在时略不如过去时常用）

如果你想强调“被选为 oral（不是 poster）”，第 1/2 句最稳。
